description:
Group 15 (vacuum_current_and_exchange_continuity) may import the following from Group 14:
OPEN OBLIGATIONS: Sigma_V source law, chi-origin, residual-kill/no-overlap, boundary neutrality, J_V flux law, J_V domain theorem, u_vac definition, u_vac static neutrality, covariant acceleration, static-source safety.
CANDIDATE ROUTES: exchange continuity J_V route, acceleration-gradient Sigma_V route.
REJECTED BRANCHES: free-q tuning, zeta dual-role, coordinate velocity frame, arbitrary preferred frame, decorative J_V, circular J_V = n_V u_vac.
POLICY RULES: recovery downstream, zeta companion requires residual-kill.
GROUP CLOSURE: A_spatial was not derived; J_V/u_vac is the surviving bottleneck.
